briefdescription.para: Initialize the network driver with provided settings.
Shutdown the driver and release resources.
Per-frame update for the network driver.
Send a packet to a specific connection.
Broadcast a packet to all connected peers.
Send a packet to the connected server (client mode).
Bind a callback invoked when the driver starts up.
Bind a callback invoked on shutdown.
Bind a callback invoked for incoming packets.
Bind a callback invoked when a connection is established.
Bind a callback invoked when a connection is lost.
Bind a NetScene to the driver for packet routing.
Lookup a connection by its id.
Invoke a function for each active connection.
Get the current number of active connections.
Get local connection identifier used by this driver.
Connect to a remote host (client mode).

simplesect.para: true if connection attempt was initiated/succeeded.
